subcodes.title: Words to the believers, spoken on 1913-12-29
subcodes.first_line: It is most significant that we are all gathered here in the Tomb of His Holiness the Bab and beneath the protection of the Blessed Perfection.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسیار خوب است که در مقام حضرت اعلی در ظل عنایت جمال مبارک همه جمعیم ابدا
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @Christian rejection of Baha'u'llah and the Baha'i Faith, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
